# Card Maker Messages

> Beautiful cards and the right words for every occasion. A client-side card and invitation maker with original messages and one-tap designs.

## Key pages
- https://cardmakermessages.com/app.html: Create a personalised digital or folded printable card.
- https://cardmakermessages.com/occasions.html: Browse all occasion message guides.
- https://cardmakermessages.com/printable-card-guide.html: Print and fold the generated PDF.
- https://cardmakermessages.com/methodology.html: How original messages are written and checked.
